en: This project collects reviewed public information and uses AI to help users find source-grounded answers.
AI answers may be incomplete or wrong. Always verify important deadlines, fees, policy, and legal matters with official sources.
Anonymous usage metrics may be recorded for rate limiting and abuse prevention. Optional question logging should be clearly disclosed.

chatEmpty.en: Ask a question about onboarding, academics, housing, facilities, or student life.

items: Knowledge base, upload review, and admin workflow placeholders.
